docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT BEAUNE, JENNIFER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-08-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ROTHMAN, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT BEAUNE, JENNIFER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE SERVED MAR-04-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BEAUNE, JENNIFER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-08-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PAUL ROTHMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JENNIFER BEAUNE IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROTHMAN, PAUL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BEAUNE, JENNIFER THERE WAS NO EVIDENCE THAT ANY ACT OR OMISSION BY THE DEFENDANT (WHO EXERCISED APPROPRIATE CAUTION UNDER THE CIRCUMSTANCES) WAS A CAUSE OF DAMAGE, LOSS OR HARM TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
